issues.title: Add documentation for the MongoDB Atlas Vector Store

comments.body: The prerequisite section is missing.  See https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/vectordbs/pinecone.html#_prerequisites for an example of hosted model docs.  Reaching out to mongodb contacts to see if they want to contribute.
Hi all, pending changes have been submitted in a PR here: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/1181. Thank you!

issues.title: Add MongoDB Atlas Vector Store Auto-Configuration and Boot Starter
issues.body:
After the [addition of MongoDB Atlas Store](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/5f0123cc9228b1befff8bbf5fd76411f7683c14e), to make most of it we need:
 - Add auto-configuration under the https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/tree/main/spring-ai-spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/autoconfigure/vectorstore
   Make sure to add the auto-configuration class to the https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/spring-ai-spring-boot-autoconfigure/src/main/resources/META-INF/spring/org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.AutoConfiguration.imports
 - Add Boot starter under the https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/tree/main/spring-ai-spring-boot-starters and register the boot-starter dependency to the BOM: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/spring-ai-bom/pom.xml
